recommendations.title: The Return of Swamp Thing
recommendations.overview: The Swamp Thing returns to battle the evil Dr. Arcane, who has a new science lab full of creatures transformed by genetic mutation, and chooses Heather Locklear as his new object of affection.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Chopping Mall

recommendations.title: Dr. Strange
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist becomes the new Sorcerer Supreme of the Earth in order to battle an evil Sorceress from the past.

recommendations.title: Piranhaconda
recommendations.overview: A hybrid creature - half piranha and half anaconda -- attacks a low-budget horror movie crew on location near her nest when her egg is stolen. Now they must outrun and kill the deadly piranhaconda as well as stop the mad scientist who stole the egg -

recommendations.title: Willow
recommendations.overview: The evil Queen Bavmorda hunts the newborn princess Elora Danan, a child prophesied to bring about her downfall. When the royal infant is found by Willow, a timid farmer and aspiring sorcerer, he's entrusted with delivering her from evil.

recommendations.title: Dragonslayer
recommendations.overview: A sorcerer and his apprentice are on a mission to kill an evil dragon to save the King’s daughter from being sacrificed according to a pact that the King himself made with the dragon to protect his kingdom.

recommendations.title: The Swan Princess

recommendations.title: OVERLORD: The Sacred Kingdom

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.overview: After his career is destroyed, a brilliant but arrogant surgeon gets a new lease on life when a sorcerer takes him under her wing and trains him to defend the world against evil.
